Rationale: Version 6 introduces support for node24, which may cause breaking changes for systems that do not currently support node24. This is necessary to maintain compatibility with newer Node.js versions and ensure long-term support for the action.
Author: dependabot[bot]
Description: GitHub Actions workflow for Project-MONAI/MONAI repository
Risk: Potential breaking changes due to node24 support requirement in systems not currently supporting node24
